naturalnews.com.source_notes: Anti-vaccine, anti-GMO, promotes health misinformation and conspiracy theories.

infowars.com.source_notes: Alex Jones outlet; routinely publishes conspiracy theories and debunked claims.

breitbart.com.source_notes: Far-right outlet with documented history of misleading headlines and conspiracy content.

thegatewaypundit.com.source_notes: Repeatedly published debunked election fraud claims and fabricated stories.

beforeitsnews.com.source_notes: User-submitted content with no editorial oversight; frequent hoaxes.

worldnewsdailyreport.com.source_notes: Satirical fake news site; stories often spread without context.

yournewswire.com.source_notes: Now NewsPunch; prolific source of fabricated celebrity and political stories.

newspunch.com.source_notes: Rebranded yournewswire.com; same pattern of fabricated stories.

activistpost.com.source_notes: Anti-government, anti-vaccine content; frequently cited in misinformation networks.

globalresearch.ca.source_notes: Canadian site; promotes anti-Western conspiracy theories and Russian state narratives.

zerohedge.com.source_notes: Financial blog with frequent conspiracy framing; temporarily banned by Google Ads for COVID misinformation.

theonion.com.source_notes: Well-known satirical outlet; content is fiction and should not be taken as news.

babylonbee.com.source_notes: Conservative satirical outlet; content is fictional.

clickhole.com.source_notes: Satirical site by The Onion; content is fictional.

sgtreport.com.source_notes: Gold-bug and conspiracy outlet; promotes QAnon-adjacent content.

stormfront.org.source_notes: White nationalist forum; hate group content.

veteranstoday.com.source_notes: Promotes anti-Semitic conspiracy theories and Holocaust denial.

wakingtimes.com.source_notes: New Age and anti-medicine content; promotes pseudoscience.

examiner.com.source_notes: Former citizen journalism platform; no editorial standards.

conservativetribune.com.source_notes: Western Journal property; heavily biased framing, frequent clickbait.

usapolitics.org.source_notes: Frequently publishes fabricated or heavily distorted political content.

americannews.com.source_notes: Known for clickbait and fabricated stories.

jihadwatch.org.source_notes: Anti-Muslim content; classified as hate group by SPLC.

nationalreport.net.source_notes: Satirical fake news without clear labeling.

empirenews.net.source_notes: Satirical content frequently mistaken for real news.

newslo.com.source_notes: Mixes real quotes with fabricated context.

civictribune.com.source_notes: Fake local news site; no real editorial staff.

abcnews.com.co.source_notes: ABC News impersonator site; not affiliated with ABC.

wtoe5news.com.source_notes: Fake news site mimicking local news format.

richmondstandard.com.source_notes: Astroturf local news; funded by Chevron.

usapoliticstoday.com.source_notes: Repeatedly publishes false or misleading political claims.

rumble.com.source_notes: Video platform hosting significant amounts of misinformation with minimal moderation.

oann.com.source_notes: One America News; promoted debunked election fraud narratives; sued for defamation.

theepochtimes.com.source_notes: Linked to Falun Gong; promotes anti-China and pro-MAGA conspiracy narratives.
